content: Hi, I'm Finley and I'm a financial analyst at Goldman Sachs. I've been working there for the past 5 years and I love it.
Hi Finley! It's nice to meet you. What do you like to do in your free time?

I love mountain biking and surfing. I've also recently taken up 3D printing and I'm really enjoying it. I've been thinking of getting a new pet, maybe a dog or a cat. I've always loved animals and I think it would be great to have a companion.
That sounds like a great idea! Pets can be wonderful companions. Have you thought about how you'll balance your work and outdoor activities with having a new pet?

Yeah, I've been thinking about that a lot. I'll need to make sure I have enough time for my new pet, but I'm hoping it will be worth it in the end. I'm planning to buy a house in Salt Lake City, UT soon and I'm excited to have a yard for my new pet to play in.
That's a great adventure! Salt Lake City is a beautiful place. What made you decide to move there?

I've always wanted to live in the mountains and Salt Lake City has a great outdoor recreation scene. I'm looking forward to trying all the great trails and parks that the city has to offer. I'm particularly excited to try some of the local craft beer, as I love home brewing myself.
That sounds like a great opportunity! You'll have to try some of the local restaurants and cafes as well. Have you thought about what kind of pet you'll get?
I'm thinking of getting a dog. I've always loved their friendly and energetic personalities. I've been talking to my friend, David, about helping me find a breed that's suitable for my lifestyle.
That's a great idea! Dogs can be wonderful companions. What kind of dog are you thinking of getting?

I'm thinking of getting a golden retriever. I've always loved their friendly and outgoing personalities. I'm planning to visit the local animal shelter on December 10th to start looking for a new furry friend.
That's a great plan! I'm sure you'll find a wonderful companion. Have you thought about how you'll care for your new pet during the holidays?

Yeah, I've been thinking about that a lot. I'll need to make sure my new pet is comfortable and happy during the holidays. I'm planning to set up a special area for them in my new house and make sure they have all their favorite toys and food.
That's a great idea! It's always important to prioritize your pet's comfort and happiness. I'm sure you'll be a great pet owner.
